utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The plan lists telemedicine and emergency mental health care with monthly costs; specified. 5) total_budget: Requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. The plan provides '€335/month' only; no annual breakdown. Since the format asks for 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown', the annual part is missing, so this item is not fully specified.
